description: Mattermost is open at the login screen in the web browser. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. Create a new private channel called 'incident-response' in the 'Main Team' workspace. Set the channel purpose to 'Coordination channel for active incident response and post-mortem discussions'. After creating the channel, post the following message in it: 'This channel is now active for incident coordination. Please follow the incident response protocol.'

metadata.expected_purpose: Coordination channel for active incident response and post-mortem discussions
